sections.paragraph:
Original: חצץ

Transliteration: châtsats

Phonetic: khaw-tsats'

BDB Definition:

  1. to divide
    1. (Qal) to divide
    2. (Piel) to divide
    3. (Pual) to be cut off, be finished
  2. to shoot arrows
    1. (Piel) archer (participle)

Origin: a primitive root [compare H2673]

TWOT entry: 721,721c

Part(s) of speech: Verb
